name: HRY_PI_RTI_PROCESS_LOG
description: To store the custom logs generated by RTI for a single person for troubleshooting purposes.

columns.Name: PROCESS_LOG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to the table hry_pi_rti_process_log

columns.Name: THREAD_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the worker thread which processed the newhire

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the ESS Job run which processed the newhire

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_all_people_f

columns.Name: FEED_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the feed which comes as a response to the ATOM API call

columns.Name: LOG_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the type of log file

columns.Name: LOG_DATA
columns.Comments: Stores the entire log data for one of the log types (refer to LOG_TYPE column) for a single person identified by PERSON_ID

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the start time of processing of the corresponding module for a newhire

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the end time of processing of the corresponding module for a newhire

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the person in RTI cycle with respect to the LOG_TYPE

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
